reviews.comment:
Ideal para parar y descansar de un largo viaje por su ubicación sobre RN9. Lo malo las sabanas y toallas no tenían aspecto totalmente limpio. Comedor no venden bebidas alcohólicas, se puede comer muy rico y bien.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for stopping and resting after a long journey due to its location on RN9. The only downside was that the sheets and towels didn't look completely clean. The restaurant doesn't sell alcoholic beverages, but the food is very good and delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OFpTV0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es un Parador obligado si vas en colectivo para el norte. Es simple pero muy variado en comidas elaboradas y al paso.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop if you're traveling north by bus. It's simple but offers a wide variety of both prepared and quick meals.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBOXZ6VlJREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
